name: m86-claude-marketplace
description: M86 curated plugins for Claude Code and Cowork — task management, plugin tooling, and proven development patterns

plugins.name: superpowers
plugins.description: Core skills library: TDD, debugging, collaboration patterns, and proven techniques

plugins.name: tasks-board
plugins.description: Visual task board backed by markdown files — epic directories, task .md files, subtask checkboxes, zero dependencies

plugins.name: docs-hub
plugins.description: Centralized Obsidian vault syncing project docs directories — SessionStart hook with timing, launchd scheduler, cross-project search

plugins.name: plugin-sync
plugins.description: Clone remote plugin repos and package them as installable .plugin files for Cowork — bridges Claude Code marketplace to Cowork

plugins.name: gemini-peer-review
plugins.description: Invoke Gemini CLI as a peer reviewer — code review, architecture advice, debugging, and security audits synthesized with Claude's analysis
